coreStack.name: React & Next.js
coreStack.context: Production SaaS apps and real-time platforms

SiteDescription: Senior Full Stack Developer building production SaaS platforms, cross-platform mobile apps, and AI-integrated systems. Writing about software engineering, architecture, and the craft of shipping real products.
name: Abdul Rafay
tag_line: I build production SaaS platforms, cross-platform apps, and AI-integrated systems.

about.whoAmI: I am a Senior Full Stack Developer who architects and ships production SaaS platforms, cross-platform mobile apps, and AI-integrated systems. At Tudo Tech Lab I built TudoNum’s professional services module from the ground up — a schema-driven form engine, multi-tier RBAC, calendar-driven booking, and multi-region payment rails across three countries. On my own time I ship products like Wryte, a collaborative Markdown editor with a custom GitHub-to-Convex sync engine, and Env Pilot, a secrets management SaaS with a VS Code extension, CLI, and granular per-variable permissions. I work with LLMs daily — Claude SDK, OpenAI, OpenRouter — and I have strong opinions about where they help and where they hurt, because I have shipped enough with them to know. I think through system design, edge cases, and long-term maintainability, and I build the scaffolding around AI tools so teams don’t ship what the model hallucinated.
about.lifeBeyondCode: Outside of work, I enjoy challenges that demand focus and strategic thinking. Competitive gaming plays a big role in how I recharge, sharpening decision-making, teamwork, and adaptability under pressure. Exploring new experiences helps me reset and maintain balance, which directly influences how I approach problem-solving and collaboration in my professional life.
about.continuousLearning: I treat learning as a core part of my work. I continuously refine my skills by adopting new tools, revisiting architectural decisions, and improving how systems are built and maintained. My learning is driven by real problems such as scaling applications, improving performance, reducing complexity, and helping teams work more effectively together. Through mentorship, collaboration, and technical leadership, I focus on building software that lasts.

roles: Architecting TudoNum, a multi-service super app spanning professional services, ride-hailing, logistics, and deliveries with a Python/Django REST backend and React + Vite frontend maintained as independent codebases

Shipped the end-to-end Professional Services module including vendor onboarding, multi-tier RBAC with in-app role switching, city- and country-scoped service discovery, calendar-driven booking with real-time availability and conflict detection, and wallet-backed checkout

Designed a schema-driven dynamic form engine where a single JSON configuration drives React to render complex multi-step forms, reused across vendor onboarding, booking flows, KYC checks, and the Company Onboarding pipeline

Integrated multi-region payment rails with Stripe for international cards plus WalPay and regional gateways covering Oman, Portugal, and Pakistan, alongside an internal wallet ledger for top-ups, transfers, and provider payouts
Built an AI-powered admin panel on the Claude SDK, OpenAI, and OpenRouter SDKs for automated triage, content generation, and operational tooling
Own production infrastructure end-to-end: frontend on Vercel, Django backend on AWS, with CI/CD pipelines, environment management, and zero-downtime release workflows
Led a 5-member team delivering Astro and React web applications with Tailwind CSS
Architected Express/Prisma backends and enforced SQL data integrity across multiple services
Implemented monitoring and end-to-end tests, achieving zero-downtime deployments
Delivered 10+ client projects spanning Astro, React, Next.js, and Flutter
Managed end-to-end project scoping, client communication, and junior developer mentoring
Automated deployment workflows and maintained code quality across multiple platforms
Built production-grade Android applications with Flutter and Firebase
Developed automated test suites and hot-fix pipelines, reducing regression incidents
Optimized performance, cutting app launch time by 40%

workExperience.position: Machine Learning Engineer & Full Stack Web Developer
roles: Built abuse-detection ML models with TensorFlow and Python achieving 92% accuracy
Developed a law-firm CMS with React, Node.js, and MongoDB, cutting content update time in half
Automated end-to-end pipelines bridging analytics and production systems
Reviewed code and wrote unit and integration tests for Java/XML applications
Designed intuitive UIs in Figma for new feature rollouts
Gained hands-on experience in Agile workflows and sprint planning

testimonials.name: Sarah Johnson
testimonials.testimonial: Working with this developer was an absolute game-changer for our startup. They delivered a robust, scalable solution that exceeded our expectations. The attention to detail and technical expertise is unmatched.

testimonials.name: Michael Chen
testimonials.testimonial: Exceptional work on our enterprise application. The code quality is outstanding, and the project was delivered on time and within budget. Communication throughout the process was excellent.

testimonials.name: Emily Rodriguez
testimonials.testimonial: From concept to deployment, the entire experience was seamless. They understood our vision perfectly and brought it to life with modern, efficient code. Highly recommend for any serious project.

testimonials.name: David Thompson
testimonials.testimonial: Outstanding technical skills combined with great communication. They helped us scale our platform to handle thousands of users. The performance improvements were remarkable.

services.title: SaaS & Web Platforms
services.description: Architecting production SaaS applications with real-time backends, multi-tenant RBAC, payment integration, and schema-driven UI systems that scale without rewriting components for every new flow.
features: Full-stack SaaS architecture with React and Next.js
Real-time backends with Convex and Django REST Framework
Multi-region payment rails with Stripe and local gateways
Role-based access control and organizational permissions
Schema-driven dynamic form engines
Zero-downtime deployment and CI/CD pipelines

services.title: Mobile App Development
services.description: Building cross-platform mobile applications with React Native and Flutter that share typed backends with web counterparts, reducing API contract drift and shipping to both app stores from a single codebase.
features: Cross-platform iOS and Android with React Native and Expo
Flutter development for performance-critical apps
Shared Convex backends between web and mobile
Biometric auth, push notifications, and offline-first storage
App Store and Play Store deployment
Monorepo architecture with Turborepo

services.title: AI & LLM Integration
services.description: Integrating large language models into production systems with provider abstraction, cost-aware routing, streaming responses, and the guardrails needed to ship AI features without hallucination risk.
features: Multi-provider AI with Claude SDK, OpenAI, and OpenRouter
Streaming AI responses with real-time UI updates
Receipt scanning, content generation, and editorial AI
Prompt engineering with security boundaries against injection
Cost-per-task routing and model selection per feature
CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, and CI scaffolding for AI-assisted teams

services.title: Cloud & Infrastructure
services.description: Setting up production infrastructure across AWS and Vercel with CI/CD pipelines, environment management, Docker containers, and monitoring for zero-downtime releases.
features: AWS infrastructure for Django backends
Vercel deployment for Next.js and Astro frontends
CI/CD with GitHub Actions and automated testing
Docker containerization and orchestration
Environment management and secrets handling
Performance monitoring and error tracking with Sentry
